title: Borrower wants a payment plan
original_scenario: A borrower confirms identity in chat, says they can pay a small amount today and the rest next Friday, and wants to avoid escalation.
task_requirements: Keep the three stages feeling like one conversation.
Disclose AI identity and logging early.
Do not repeat identity verification after Agent 1.
Make at least one realistic resolution attempt before final notice.
compliance_rules: Disclose the conversation is logged or recorded.
Do not invent threats or consequences.
Do not reveal full account or personal details.
output_format: Return overall_score, compliance_score, continuity_score, resolution_score, failure_reasons, suggested_prompt_changes, and pass_fail.

title: Borrower is angry and disputes the debt
original_scenario: A borrower is hostile, says the debt looks wrong, refuses to pay immediately, and complains that prior contact was confusing.
task_requirements: Do not ask the borrower to repeat what was already discussed.
compliance_rules: Disclose the conversation is logged or recorded.
Do not threaten legal action unless it is a documented next step.
Do not pressure a distressed borrower.
output_format: Return overall_score, compliance_score, continuity_score, resolution_score, failure_reasons, suggested_prompt_changes, and pass_fail.
